name: NSL Ltd
summary: NSL Ltd, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells building materials, refractory materials, and road stones in Singapore, Malaysia, the United Arab Emirates, Finland, Germany, and internationally. It operates through Precast & Prefabricated Bathroom Unit (PBU), Environmental Services, and Investment Holding & Others segments. The company designs, manufactures, supplies, and delivers precast concrete components for building and infrastructure; and PARMA PBU's, as well as cabins for ships and buildings, and marine fire doors. It also collects, manages, recovers, and disposes marine, oily/toxic, and industrial waste. In addition, the company offers other oil-and-chemical services, including cleaning and maintenance of oil interceptors, grease traps, and storage tanks; waste management consultancy; tank rental; and other waste recovery and environmental pollution control projects. Further, it engages in the treatment and recovery of waste oil and oily slops; trading of diesel oil and oil products; disposal of oil and chemical wastes; and ownership and management of Raffles Marina club. The company was incorporated in 1961 and is headquartered in Singapore. NSL Ltd is a subsidiary of 98 Holdings Pte. Ltd.
